sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian hong hehpihna’n, A geel hotkhiat kicing;
Langdo mite honkhia dingin, a thupha sung

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Upna tawh gupna i ngah, up man, up man,
Nang dikna hilo upna tawh sep hilo,
Sep hi lo, sep hi lo, hi leh mi kisial ding,
Sep hi lo, hi leh mi kisial ding,
Pasian hong piakkhong hi, Pasian hong
Pasian hong piakkhong hi, Pasian hong piakkhong hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hih Pasian’ thupha lian, Tapa ah kilangsak;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A um takpi mite, Pasian in hong theisak;
